title: zigadenus makinoanus
intro: Zigadenus makinoanus is a perennial plant species native to Japan, belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae) and commonly known as Makino's fritillaria or Japanese snake lily. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving fever, reducing pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Zigadenus makinoanus is often used in traditional Japanese medicine, and its roots are dried and processed into a powder or tea for consumption.
